query:
SELECT DISTINCT
               awc.agent_id AS "source_agent_id!",
               COALESCE(awc.catalogue_display_name, awc.agent_display_name, awc.agent_id)
                 AS "display_name!"
          FROM agents_with_catalogue awc
          JOIN measurements m ON m.source_agent_id = awc.agent_id
         ORDER BY 2 ASC
